title: bryonia dioica subsp. angulosa
intro: Bryonia dioica subsp. angulosa, also known as White Bryony, is a perennial climber of the Cucurbitaceae family, native to Europe and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antispasmodic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of White Bryony include relieving pain and reducing inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever, arthritis, and digestive problems. White Bryony is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
